data.description: Oil's Supply Glut Enough to Keep a Lid on Prices

data.title: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. closes $172.5 million IPO with 17.25 million units sold, including underwriters' option.
data.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. revealed today the completion of its initial public offering of 17,250,000 units, with 2,250,000 units from the over-allotment exercised by underwriters. The Company is listed as Nasdaq: BLRKU.

data.title: Oracle shares slip on report of OpenAI data center delays to 2028, $300 billion AI build-out affected, down 24.6%.
data.description: Shares of Oracle Corp (NYSE: ORCL) experienced a decline as reports surfaced that some of the data centers being constructed for OpenAI by the company will now be finished in 2028 instead of the previously anticipated 2027. The delay in timelines for Oracle's significant $300 billion AI build-out has sparked concerns about execution, with Bloomberg attributing the setback to labor and material shortages. Despite this, Oracle's projects in the U.S. remain ambitious, expected to culminate in some of the world's largest data centers upon completion. The current share price is 24.6% below its... Further insights can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investor Alert: Hagens Berman investigates potential disclosure violations at ALT5 Sigma (ALTS) amid CEO suspension and auditor resignation.
data.description: Reed Kathrein, a partner, is currently looking into potential cases of false financial reporting after the suspension of the CEO, resignation of the auditor, and Nasdaq non-compliance. The investigation is being conducted by Hagens Berman, a national shareholder rights law firm, in relation to ALT5 Sigma. The situation arose in San Francisco on December 12, 2025. This development underscores concerns of fraudulent activities in the financial sector, with emphasis on transparency and accountability.

data.title: Centric Consulting achieves 80% faster application modernization using AI and human expertise, validated by client results.
data.description: Dayton, Ohio - On December 12, 2025, Centric Consulting of DAYTON, Ohio announced their success in modernizing outdated systems by combining agentic AI and human expertise. Through client results, Centric's proprietary framework has proven effective in delivering strong outcomes. The company's approach, known as Artificial Intelligence (AI) Augmented Development, has shown great promise in revitalizing legacy systems.

data.title: ACI to host 13th Annual False Claims and Qui Tam Enforcement Forum, addressing new DOJ priorities.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, significant changes in enforcement priorities and resource allocation within the Department of Justice are creating a more intricate regulatory landscape for in-house counsel. This evolving environment includes new policy initiatives, making it challenging for legal professionals to navigate. These developments indicate a shift in focus towards stricter enforcement measures and require vigilance from legal teams.

data.title: Morgan-Keller acquires Gruber-Latimer Restoration, a masonry restoration firm specializing in historic preservation.
data.description: Frederick, Maryland - On December 12, 2025, Morgan-Keller, a top general contractor in the Mid-Atlantic area, has successfully acquired Gruber-Latimer Restoration. This company is renowned for its expertise in masonry restoration, with a focus on historical preservation ventures throughout Maryland. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for Morgan-Keller as it expands its portfolio and establishes a stronger presence in the restoration sector.

data.title: Piedmont Natural Gas in Charlotte offers energy-saving tips for customers ahead of falling temperatures to manage seasonal bills.
data.description: As temperatures are anticipated to drop significantly in the Southeast next week, residents in Charlotte, NC can benefit from energy-saving tips and payment programs to better manage their seasonal bills. Taking proactive steps in energy efficiency can help reduce natural gas usage. This initiative highlights the importance of implementing strategies to lessen the impact of the cold weather on heating systems. By following these tips, customers can save on energy costs and ensure their homes stay warm during the winter. It is crucial for residents to be mindful of their energy consumption, especially during the colder months, to maintain affordability and sustainability in their households.

data.title: Brady relaunches secure firearm storage website EndFamilyFire.org to reduce shooting deaths before holidays. Site had 500k visits last year.
data.description: Last year, EndFamilyFire.org received over 500,000 visits, offering gun owners information on secure firearm storage to prevent shooting deaths and injuries. The program, End Family Fire by Brady, collaborates with the Ad Council to promote this initiative. The organization aims to raise awareness about responsible gun ownership and has proven to be a valuable resource for the community.

data.title: Global inventory management software market to grow at 8.1% CAGR from 2025 to 2031 due to supply efficiency, cloud adoption, real-time tracking.
data.description: A report on the Inventory Management Software Market predicts significant growth opportunities. The market is anticipated to expand at a CAGR of 8.1% from 2025 to 2031. Key factors driving this growth include the rising demand for enhanced supply chain efficiency, increased utilization of cloud-based solutions, and a growing preference for real-time tracking capabilities. The global market landscape presents promising prospects, indicating a positive outlook for the industry in the foreseeable future.
FCC Chair Carr: FCC To Consider Federal Reporting Standard For AI Models

data.title: Batteries Plus adds 63 new units across all 50 states, driven by surging franchise interest and strategic growth.
data.description: The rapidly increasing interest in franchise opportunities and the strategic expansion of territories indicate strong year-end growth for the top battery and power solutions service center in the nation. Located in HARTLAND, Wis., news dated Dec. 12, 2025, shows that Batteries Plus is experiencing a remarkable surge in franchise development, with promising figures showcasing exceptional momentum as the year comes to a close.

data.title: BitGo gets OCC approval to convert trust company to national bank named BitGo Bank & Trust; Now operates as a national bank.
data.description: In New York, BitGo Holdings, Inc. has been authorized by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to transition its subsidiary, BitGo Trust Company, Inc., from a state trust company in South Dakota to a national bank named BitGo Bank & Trust, National Association (N.A.). This transformation allows BitGo's Trust Company to function as BitGo Bank & Trust, National Association following the OCC's recent approval. The move signifies a shift to operating at a national level for BitGo.

data.title: UKG to acquire Inova Payroll, a U.S.-based HCM & payroll services provider for SMBs, subject to closing conditions.
data.description: UKG Inc., a prominent global AI platform specializing in HR, pay, and workforce management, has recently finalized a deal to acquire Inova Payroll, a U.S.-based company offering human capital management (HCM) and payroll services to small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs). This agreement is contingent upon standard closing conditions. Through this acquisition, UKG aims to offer innovative outsourced HR assistance and comprehensive benefits brokerage services directly to the SMB market segment.

data.title: Laser by Aleya in Great Neck, NY aligns with clean aesthetic movement with non-invasive laser treatments.
data.description: A New York-based company called Laser by Aleya based in Great Neck, has recently expanded its core services to cater to the increasing interest in clean aesthetics. The company specializes in laser and electrolysis hair removal services. This move comes in response to the growing demand for minimalist beauty trends. The announcement was made on December 12, 2025.

data.title: USPS reveals release of Priority Mail and Priority Mail Express stamps through March 2026. More subjects to come.
data.description: The U.S. Postal Service has disclosed the first-day-of-issue dates and locations for Priority Mail and Priority Mail Express stamps set to be released through March 2026. The announcement was made in Washington on December 12, 2025. The upcoming year will see the release of a variety of stamp subjects, with specific details to be revealed at a later date. The Postal Service's schedule for stamp releases indicates a diverse range of designs and themes for collectors and mail senders to look forward to in the coming years.

data.title: Netmarble reveals new trailer for The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin at Game Awards 2025. Includes multiverse narrative and multiplayer boss battles.
data.description: Netmarble, a prominent game developer and publisher, unveiled a new trailer for its upcoming open-world action RPG, The Seven. The game, set in a multiverse narrative, promises intense multiplayer boss battles in a vast open world. The reveal took place in Seoul, South Korea, on December 12, 2025. This eagerly anticipated game by Netmarble is anticipated to offer players an immersive gaming experience with its unique setting and challenging gameplay elements.

data.title: EMA's CHMP approved Novo Nordisk's high-dose Wegovy 7.2 mg. Application for single-dose device submitted. U.S. and U.K. reviews ongoing. FDA considering rapid review for Eli Lilly.
data.description: Recently, the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use provided a favorable opinion for Novo Nordisk A/S's higher dosage of Wegovy, semaglutide 7.2 mg. Novo Nordisk has requested approval from the EMA for a new single-dose device to administer Wegovy 7.2 mg. Furthermore, semaglutide 7.2 mg is currently undergoing assessment in the U.S., U.K., and various other nations. This development comes as the FDA considers expediting the review process for Eli Lilly's obesity pill, and Novo Nordisk approaches its product launch. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
